title: I'll Show You the Town
writer: Elmer Davis, Raymond L. Schrock, Harvey F. Thew
actors: Reginald Denny, Marian Nixon, Edward Kimball
plot: A bachelor who cannot bring himself to break a date ends up with three dates at the same restaurant on the same night. He juggles the dates, keeping each from seeing the others, by feigning reasons to excuse himself from each table.
